56.reason: [If the file "article.txt" does not exist or cannot be opened, fopen returns NULL, and subsequent fgets will cause undefined behavior. The program should check if article is NULL before proceeding.]

80.reason: [Loop condition should be i < num, not i <= num. When i == num, count[i] is uninitialized (except cnt=0), leading to undefined behavior in strcmp.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition should be i < num, not i <= num. When i == num, count[i] is uninitialized (except cnt=0), leading to undefined behavior in strcmp.]
